Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Yeah, everyone around here does.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}First, we need to stop the bleeding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}He defeated that Shadow all by himself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Wait, does that mean... this dog's a Persona-user!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}He says, "This is a place of peace, so I protected it."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}There are flowers over there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Those flowers... They must be for the priest who died in the accident here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}So he really was guarding this place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Okay, hold on. Aigis, don't tell me you can translate dog language too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Canines do not have their own language. However, speech is not the only means of communication.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}This fella really is a rare breed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}All right, let's report to the chairman so we can conclude this mission.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}As for a vet, it's midnight, but I think I can arrange something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Good job, boy. You're one amazing dog.[n]{f 1 1}
